channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sunken manhole and potholes, 1st July
item.description:
Sunken manhole and several potholes around it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken manhole, 1st July
item.description:
The manhole has sunk causing cars the swerve
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rattling man hole cover, 1st July
item.description:
Near 18a Folly Lane, at the cross-road of Folly Lane with Festival Way and Margrett Road. Every time a car drives on that man home cover it makes a “clunk” noise that resonates in the whole neighbourhood. It’s been like that for a while but it’s particularly annoying in the summer when we want to be able to sleep with windows opened

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Festival Way, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue weight limit sign fallen and facing wrong way, 1st July
item.description:
On a lamppost on Stoke Orchard Road, opposite the junction with Lyndley Chase.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: The paving slabs have been damaged by heavy vehicles driving over the slabs move when walking on which I tripped over this is a pavement many children use to walk to school and it’s dangerous, 1st July
item.description:
34 orchard avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Byron Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Loose drain cover rattles when vehicles drive over it, 1st July
item.description:
On main road outside entrance to driveway of Appletree, Swindon Lane. Issue has been present for as long as I can remember and prior to resurfacing but is exacerbated when parked vehicles nearby cause passing traffic to deviate directly over the cover.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Swindon Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked Drain, 1st July
item.description:
The drain on the left hand side carriageway on St Pauls Road opposite the junction of Folly Lane is blocked. This is the THIRD time I've reported this issue and STILL it hasn't been resolved. As previously mentioned when this blocked drain causes flooding across the road, cyclists like myself, have to take evasive action heading into oncoming traffic. This could possibly be life threatening and so needs to be addressed IMMEDIATELY. Also the next drain in the sequence is also blocked as in the next one opposite so the whole drainage system in this location needs to be inspected.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Paul's Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings are not very visible so people are parking across our drive., 1st July
item.description:
Outside 7 Sandford Mill Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Southgate Drive, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Another dumped trolley, 1st July
item.description:
Farmfoods this time. Is this road where shopping trolleys go to die?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Brooklyn Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 1st July
item.description:
Permit is needed for a pavement license to do work outside the pub as a vehicle hit the pub and caused structural damage. Pavement closure
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cut grass in children’s playground, 1st July
item.description:
The grass in the kids play area is too long for small children and toddlers. You cannot see the cracks in the ground creating trip hazards. The grass is way too long for a kids play area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bibury Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish, 1st July
item.description:
There are bags of rubbish left inside Scholars Court. There is also a tyre under a nearby hedge as well. I don't know if an uplift has already been arranged or if this rubbish has been there for a while. ///brand.spend.fade https://w3w.co/brand.spend.fade

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Scholars Court, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish, 1st July
item.description:
Inside Scholars Court are bags of rubbish and a tyre under a hedge. I don't know if an uplift has already been arranged or if it has been there for some time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Scholars Court, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
